info.title: PDFShift API (mock subset)
info.description: Focused subset of the PDFShift v3 HTML-to-PDF conversion API used by the OpenFn pdfshift adaptor. Covers PDF conversion (POST /convert/pdf, called by generatePDF), credits usage, and account details. Derived from the official PDFShift OpenAPI document at https://docs.pdfshift.io/openapi.json. The convert endpoint returns a raw binary PDF by default, or a JSON conversion-result object when filename/webhook is used or when encode is true.

apiKeyHeader.name: X-API-Key
apiKeyHeader.description: Authenticate by including your secret key in the HTTP header X-API-Key. Manage keys in the PDFShift dashboard.

source.description: The HTML document (raw string) or a URL to convert to PDF.

sandbox.description: Generate the PDF in dev/sandbox mode. Produces a watermarked document that does not consume credits.

encode.description: Return the generated PDF as a Base64-encoded string instead of raw binary. Defaults to true in the adaptor.

filename.description: Optional. 7+ characters (letters, numbers, '-' or '_'). When set, the file is stored and the API returns a JSON result containing a temporary download URL (kept ~2 days) instead of the binary PDF.

webhook.description: Optional callback URL for async conversion. When set, the API responds with a queued acknowledgement and later POSTs the result to this URL.

use_print.description: Use the print CSS stylesheet instead of the screen stylesheet.

format.description: Page format, e.g. 'A4', 'Letter', 'Legal', or a custom 'widthxheight' value.

landscape.description: Render the document in landscape orientation.

css.description: Additional CSS (URL or raw string) applied before conversion.

ConversionResult.description: JSON result returned by a conversion endpoint when filename/webhook is used or encode is true.

url.description: Temporary download URL for the generated document (when filename/webhook is used).

filesize.description: Size of the generated document in bytes.

duration.description: Total time taken to generate the document, in milliseconds.

response.description: Details about loading the source document.

status-code.description: HTTP status code PDFShift received when loading an HTTP source.

executed.description: ISO 8601 timestamp at which the conversion ran.

pdf_pages.description: Total number of pages in the generated PDF.

Credits.description: Current credit usage for the account.

base.description: Default credit limit from the current plan.

remaining.description: Credits still available for the current period.

total.description: Total credit limit (may exceed base if overage is enabled).

used.description: Credits consumed so far this period.

post.summary: Convert HTML or a URL to PDF
post.description: Converts an HTML string or a URL to a PDF document. Called by the adaptor's generatePDF operation. Returns a raw binary PDF by default; returns a JSON ConversionResult when filename or webhook is provided, or a Base64-encoded PDF string when encode is true.

200.description: PDF generated successfully. Binary PDF, Base64 string, or a JSON conversion result depending on the request options.

202.description: Async conversion accepted (webhook provided). Result will be POSTed to the webhook.

401.description: Unauthorized. Invalid, missing, or disabled API key.

429.description: Too Many Requests. Rate limit exceeded.

get.description: Returns the current credits usage: total, remaining and used credits for the current period.
Returns details about the authenticated account, including plan and billing information.
